{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-239g-2685-54x3. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
The install utility in uutils coreutils is vulnerable to a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition during file installation. The implementation unlinks an existing destination file and then recreates it using a path-based operation without the O_EXCL flag. A local attacker can exploit the window between the unlink and the subsequent creation to swap the path with a symbolic link, allowing them to redirect privileged writes to overwrite arbitrary system files.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v24v-f45g-w7jf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:10:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v24v-f45g-w7jf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v24v-f45g-w7jf"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35355", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/10067", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.6.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/b5bbabc18a1121908848d836f869a4e98eb63886", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v24v-f45g-w7jf"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T19:54:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v24v-f45g-w7jf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T19:54:01Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition
